subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Blessed Beauty! Thy letter was received, and from its contents it became known that thou dwellest in Pune, yet art in distress [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال مبارک نامه رسید و از مضمون معلوم گردید که در پونه مقیم ولی در تعب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
